violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in plastic covered containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Handsinks are lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands must be posted at all handsinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, mixers, knives, pizza paddles) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Day old-calzones observed for sale in self service refrigerator. Establishment uses Time As A Control for calzones, which requires disposal at the end of 4 hours. Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Items (bread, cookies, calzones) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels, or have incomplete labels without subingredients listed. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Food observed stored in the mop sink room. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The ice scoop and pizza paddles observed stored on unclean surfaces (counter and beneath oven) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up in one container, and the food contact surface up in another. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in areas of the kitchen and storage shed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
A large strainer was not in good repair, with pieces chipped off. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:Coffee filter rackcounter cupboard near hand sinkMagic Chef unitrefrigerators including door handlesfreezersrolling rackscan opener basechest freezerdry ingredient bins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel/dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen is in poor repair, with tiles stained from previous water damage, and some tiles missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2025

The area outside the kitchen door along the building has an accumulation of vegetation and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The fan covers and ceiling in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2025

The walls in the dough machine area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The order board and chain above the food prep area has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
